description: ML diagnostics: drift analysis, training metrics, spot-level detail, prediction log.

panels.title: Dataset Drift
panels.description: Whether data drift was detected in the latest feature-pipeline run.

panels.title: Drifted Columns
panels.description: Number of feature columns flagged with drift.

panels.title: Drift Share
panels.description: Maximum drift score across all columns.

panels.title: Feature Drift Score
panels.description: Per-column feature drift scores over time.

panels.title: Inference Drift Score
panels.description: Per-column inference drift scores over time.

panels.title: Drift Score by Column
panels.description: Tabular view of per-column drift scores and detection flags.

panels.title: Drift Detection by Column
panels.description: Binary drift detection flags per column over time.

panels.title: Accuracy
panels.description: Training Accuracy metric over time.

panels.title: RMSE
panels.description: Training RMSE metric over time.

panels.title: R²
panels.description: Training R² metric over time.

panels.title: MAE
panels.description: Training MAE metric over time.

panels.title: Total Rows
panels.description: Total labelled row count used for training.

panels.title: Feature Count
panels.description: Number of feature columns used for training.

panels.title: Train Split
panels.description: Number of rows in the training split.

panels.title: Test Split
panels.description: Number of rows in the test split.

panels.title: Model Version
panels.description: Numeric version of the registered model.

panels.title: Evaluation Report
panels.description: Whether the latest training run produced an evaluation report.

panels.title: Model Registered
panels.description: Whether the latest training run registered a model version.

panels.title: Range Violations per Spot
panels.description: Range violation counts per spot from the latest feature-pipeline run.

panels.title: Feature Stage States
panels.description: State of each feature-pipeline stage.

panels.title: Total Prediction Rows
panels.description: Retained rows in the durable prediction-event log.

panels.title: Model Count
panels.description: Distinct model versions in the prediction log.

panels.title: Rows per Model
panels.description: Prediction log rows broken down by model version.

panels.title: Monitoring Schedule Activity
panels.description: Prediction-monitoring scheduling attempts over time.

panels.title: Monitoring Execution Activity
panels.description: Prediction-monitoring execution counts over time.

panels.title: Last Success Age
panels.description: Seconds since the last successful prediction-monitoring execution.

title: FoehnCast ML Diagnostics
